profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Nusa Palapa Gemilang Tbk manufactures and sells primary macronutrient compound fertilizers in Indonesia. It operates through Business-to-Business (B2B) and Business-to-Customer (B2C) segments. The company offers NPK granules and microgranule fertilizers. It also provides various products, including Nutrimix GT, CCF fertilizer Ferticote, SinutriHS, and Ferticomp. PT Nusa Palapa Gemilang Tbk was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Gresik, Indonesia.
